heroHeadline: Day 38: Hegseth Confirms Strikes Intensifying as Hormuz Deadline Looms; Rescuers Search Bombed Iranian Homes
heroSubtitle: US-Israeli air campaign escalating ahead of Strait of Hormuz deadline — hitting residential areas as civilian toll rises. N. Korea won't back Tehran. GOP congressman raises ground troop possibility.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian.
